children.heading: Right of contract producers to cancel production contracts
children.label: a Right of contract producers to cancel production contracts
A
children.text: the date that is 3 business days after the date on which the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract is executed; or

children.label: B
children.text: any cancellation date specified in the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract.

children.label: A
children.text: the right of the poultry grower or swine production contract grower to cancel the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract;

children.label: B
children.text: the method by which the poultry grower or swine production contract grower may cancel the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract; and

children.label: C
children.text: the deadline for canceling the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract.

children.heading: Required disclosure of additional capital investments in production contracts
children.label: b Required disclosure of additional capital investments in production contracts

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract shall contain on the first page a statement identified as “Additional Capital Investments Disclosure Statement”, which shall conspicuously state that additional large capital investments may be required of the poultry grower or swine production contract grower during the term of the poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract.

children.heading: Application
children.label: 2 Application
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall apply to any poultry growing arrangement or swine production contract entered into, amended, altered, modified, renewed, or extended after the date of the enactment of this section.
